proposal_summary: This proposal registers the `on.eth` ENS name to the ENS DAO wallet and sets the resolver to an on-chain registry-resolver contract (ChainResolver).

claimed_actions.raw_action: Adding the DAO wallet as a controller on the `BaseRegistrarImplementation` smart contract.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Adds the ENS DAO wallet as a controller temporarily to allow registration
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Adding the DAO wallet as a controller on the `BaseRegistrarImplementation` smart contract.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Registering the name `on.eth` to the DAO wallet.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Registers on.eth to the DAO wallet
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Registering the name `on.eth` to the DAO wallet.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Setting the deployed `ChainResolver` as the resolver for `on.eth`
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Points on.eth to the ChainResolver contract
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Setting the deployed `ChainResolver` as the resolver for on.eth

claimed_actions.raw_action: Removing the DAO wallet as a controller on the `BaseRegistrarImplementation` smart contract.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Removes the ENS DAO wallet as a controller after registration is complete
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Removing the DAO wallet as a controller on the `BaseRegistrarImplementation` smart contract.

claimed_complexity.reason: Involves temporarily taking a controller role, registering a domain, updating the resolver, and renouncing the controller role.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: This proposal includes four components. 1. Adding the DAO wallet as a controller... 2. Registering the name `on.eth`... 3. Setting the deployed `ChainResolver`... 4. Removing the DAO wallet as a controller...

limitations: Raw calldata is provided instead of function signatures.
